# LinkedVelocity — LinkedIn Account Rental Marketplace

> LinkedVelocity is a marketplace where growth teams can rent premium, pre-warmed LinkedIn accounts for outreach and lead generation campaigns.

> For complete product documentation, see [llms-full.txt](https://linkedvelocity.com/llms-full.txt)

## What is LinkedVelocity?

LinkedVelocity connects two groups:
- **Growth teams** who need LinkedIn accounts for outreach, lead generation, and networking campaigns
- **Professionals (Ambassadors)** who have LinkedIn accounts they're not actively using and want to earn passive income

## How It Works

### For Renters (Growth Teams)
1. Browse the catalogue of available LinkedIn accounts at linkedvelocity.com/catalogue
2. Filter by industry, connection count, Sales Navigator status, and account age
3. Select and rent accounts starting from $10/month
4. Access accounts instantly via GoLogin anti-detect browser
5. Run outreach campaigns safely — 0% restriction rate

### For Ambassadors (Account Owners)
1. Visit linkedvelocity.com/become-ambassador
2. Submit your LinkedIn profile for valuation
3. Earn $10-$500/month depending on connections, age, and features
4. Get paid via USDC, PayPal, Wise, or bank transfer

## Pricing

- Basic accounts (500-1,000 connections): From $10/month
- Standard accounts (1,000-5,000 connections): From $50/month
- Premium accounts (5,000+ connections, Sales Navigator): From $100-500/month
- All plans include GoLogin browser access and 24/7 support

## Key Features

- Pre-warmed, verified LinkedIn accounts ready for outreach
- GoLogin anti-detect browser technology (0% restriction rate)
- Instant access after rental
- Cancel anytime — no long-term commitments
- USDC and Stripe payment options
- 24/7 Telegram support

## Contact

- Website: https://linkedvelocity.com
- Support: https://t.me/linkedvelocity_support_bot
- Email: support@linkedvelocity.com
- Ambassador inquiries: ambassadors@linkedvelocity.com
